meta.title: AI Ecosystem Mindmap 2026
meta.subtitle: Phân tầng từ Nền tảng → Ứng dụng → Xu hướng

layers.name: Nền Tảng
layers.desc: Protocols chuẩn hóa giao tiếp — mọi thứ khác xây trên lớp này

layers.name: Hạ Tầng
layers.desc: Frameworks xây agents + Platforms chạy chúng

layers.name: Trí Tuệ
layers.desc: Memory giữ context · Skills mở rộng khả năng · Orchestration phối hợp

layers.name: Ứng Dụng
layers.desc: Công cụ AI coding và quy trình tạo ứng dụng thực tế

layers.name: Xu Hướng
layers.desc: Những xu hướng đang định hình tương lai AI 2026

sections.title: Protocols — Nền tảng giao tiếp chuẩn

cards.name: MCP — Model Context Protocol
cards.desc: Open standard của Anthropic (Nov 2024) — chuẩn hóa cách AI kết nối với tools, databases, APIs. Giải quyết bài toán N×M integration.
cards.detail:
Agent ↔ Tool communication · Giống "USB-C cho AI" · Được OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Cursor, Replit, Sourcegraph adopt
MCP Apps (Jan 2026): Extension mới — tools trả về interactive UI (dashboards, forms) trực tiếp trong conversation
Skills over MCP: Experimental — skill discovery & distribution qua MCP primitives

cards.name: A2A — Agent2Agent Protocol
cards.desc: Open protocol của Google (Apr 2025) — chuẩn hóa cách agent giao tiếp với agent khác, bất kể framework hay vendor.
cards.detail:
Agent ↔ Agent communication · Bổ sung MCP (MCP = tools, A2A = agents)
Agent Cards: JSON mô tả capabilities, cho phép agent discover nhau
v0.3 (Jul 2025): gRPC support, security cards, Python SDK mở rộng
150+ organizations support · Linux Foundation hosted
cards.note: 💡 Dùng MCP cho tools, A2A cho agents — 2 protocol bổ sung nhau, không thay thế!

sections.title: Agent Frameworks — Xây dựng AI agents

cards.name: LangGraph
cards.desc: Stateful agent orchestration · LangChain ecosystem

cards.name: CrewAI
cards.desc: Role-based agent teams · Low-code orchestration

cards.name: AutoGen
cards.desc: Microsoft · Multi-agent conversations · Scalable

cards.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
cards.desc: Lightweight Python · Multi-agent + guardrails

cards.name: Google ADK
cards.desc: Agent Dev Kit · Gemini + Vertex AI · A2A native

cards.name: LlamaIndex
cards.desc: RAG specialist · Knowledge-intensive workflows

cards.name: Pydantic AI
cards.desc: Type-safe agents · Validated LLM outputs · Production

cards.name: Rasa
cards.desc: Conversational AI · Private infra · Voice + Studio

sections.title: Platforms & Config — Nền tảng AI & files hệ thống

cards.name: Claude.ai (Web)
cards.desc: Chat interface với memory, search, tools

cards.name: Claude Code (CLI)
cards.desc: Terminal-based coding agent — 200K context

cards.name: ChatGPT (Web)
cards.desc: Hệ thống files tương tự Claude.ai

cards.name: Codex CLI
cards.desc: OpenAI's coding agent — CLI + Cloud sandbox

sections.title: Memory Systems — Bộ nhớ xuyên phiên

cards.name: Claude-Mem
cards.desc: Plugin cho Claude Code — tự động capture tool usage, nén bằng AI (Agent SDK), inject context vào sessions tương lai.
cards.detail:
Kiến trúc: 5 lifecycle hooks (SessionStart → UserPromptSubmit → PostToolUse → Summary → SessionEnd)
RAD (Retrieval Augmented Decisions): open standard mới — RAG captures knowledge, RAD captures intelligence
Endless Mode: ~1000 tool uses (vs 50 mặc định), O(N) scaling

subItems.title: CLAUDE.md (native)
subItems.desc: Bộ nhớ tích hợp sẵn của Claude Code: 4 cấp hierarchy (user → project → local → managed). Import files với @path syntax.

subItems.title: OpenClaw Session Memory
subItems.desc: Per-agent session files + SOUL.md personality. Cross-session nhưng isolated per workspace.

subItems.title: ByteRover
subItems.desc: Self-improving memory layer cho AI coding agents. Unify "vibe-coding" memories across projects & teams qua MCP.

subItems.title: MemGPT / Letta
subItems.desc: Stateful agents with persistent memory — kiến trúc tiered memory (core/archival/recall).

cards.name: Universal Agent Skills
cards.desc: Skills = SKILL.md files chứa instructions cho AI agent. Đơn giản nhưng cực kỳ mạnh — cross-platform compatible.
cards.detail:
awesome-agent-skills (VoltAgent): 200+ skills từ official teams + community
antigravity-awesome-skills: 626+ skills — "OS for your AI Agent"
Compatible: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, Antigravity, OpenCode

subItems.title: Engineering & DevOps
subItems.desc: API testing, React components, security blue books, deep research, N8n automation

subItems.title: Cross-Agent Orchestration
subItems.desc: Codex Skill — prompt Codex từ Claude Code. Session handoff giữa CC ↔ Codex CLI.

subItems.title: AI/ML Research
subItems.desc: 77 AI research skills (model arch, fine-tuning, distributed training, inference, MLOps)

subItems.title: Claude Code Ecosystem
subItems.desc: Claude Task Master, Happy Coder (mobile), Claude Swarm, Context Engineering Kit

cards.name: Claude-Flow
cards.desc: Agent orchestration platform — kiến trúc Queen + Workers, switch giữa Claude/GPT/Gemini qua MCP.

cards.name: OpenClaw
cards.desc: Personal AI Assistant "24/7 Jarvis" — 135k⭐. Focus: chat-based, 15+ channels (WhatsApp, Telegram, Zalo...).

cards.name: Claude Squad
cards.desc: Terminal app quản lý nhiều Claude Code + Codex sessions song song trong separate workspaces.

sections.title: AI Coding Agents — Công cụ code bằng AI

cards.name: Claude Code
cards.desc: Anthropic · CLI agent · 200K context · Multi-file refactoring · Best for complex projects

cards.name: Cursor
cards.desc: IDE agent · Composer + Agent mode · Best for daily coding · Multi-file context aware

cards.name: Codex CLI
cards.desc: OpenAI · CLI + Cloud · Task-centric · Deterministic multi-step

cards.name: Windsurf
cards.desc: Cascade Flow architecture · $15/mo · GPT-5.2-Codex support · JetBrains plugin

cards.name: GitHub Copilot
cards.desc: Microsoft · Agent mode · VS Code native · Enterprise-ready

cards.name: Gemini CLI
cards.desc: Google · Terminal · Skills compatible · ADK integration · 1M token context

cards.name: Cline / RooCode
cards.desc: Open-source VS Code extension · Multi-model · MCP support · Community-driven

cards.name: Kiro (AWS)
cards.desc: "AI IDE for adults" — Spec-driven: requirements → design doc → task plan → implement

cards.name: Replit Agent
cards.desc: Cloud agent · Full-stack generation · Best for beginners · Fast prototyping

sections.title: AI Trends 2026 — Xu hướng đang định hình tương lai

cards.name: Multi-Agent Systems
cards.desc: Gartner: 1,445% surge inquiries về multi-agent (Q1 2024 → Q2 2025). 40% enterprise apps sẽ embed AI agents cuối 2026.

cards.name: Mechanistic Interpretability
cards.desc: MIT Breakthrough 2026: Hiểu cách LLM hoạt động bên trong. Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepMind đều đang nghiên cứu.

cards.name: World Models
cards.desc: LeCun rời Meta lập lab riêng ($5B). Google Genie, World Labs Marble, Runway GWM-1. Gaming market $276B by 2030.

cards.name: Generative Coding
cards.desc: MIT Breakthrough 2026: AI viết 30% code Microsoft, 25%+ Google. "English is the new programming language."

cards.name: Chinese Open-Source AI
cards.desc: DeepSeek R1 — open-source reasoning model gây sốc. Silicon Valley dùng ngầm Chinese models. Lag giảm từ months → weeks.

cards.name: Post-Training > Pre-Training
cards.desc: Scaling laws chạm giới hạn. Focus chuyển sang post-training (RL, fine-tuning), specialized models thay vì bigger models.

cards.name: AI Drug Discovery
cards.desc: 2026 = stress test năm — AI-discovered drugs vào mid/late-stage clinical trials. Focus: oncology, rare diseases.

cards.name: AI Infrastructure
cards.desc: Hyperscale data centers: 1GW+ mỗi cái. Nuclear power cho AI. Market $7.6B → $52B by 2030 (49.6% CAGR).

cards.name: AI Governance
cards.desc: "Governance agents" giám sát AI khác. Enterprise Agentic Automation + deterministic guardrails + HITL.

workflow.title: Quy Trình Tạo App — Mỗi bước = Agent(s) + Skill
workflow.note: 💡 Pattern chung: 1 agent hoặc nhiều agent cùng dùng 1 skill — cho phép tái sử dụng skill và phối hợp linh hoạt.

relations.to: A2A = Bộ đôi protocol chuẩn: MCP cho tools, A2A cho agent-to-agent
Dùng MCP để kết nối tools, có thể dùng A2A cho inter-agent
Plugin cho Claude Code · Giữ memory xuyên Quy trình tạo app
Cross-compatible: Claude Code = Codex = Gemini CLI = Cursor
Claude Code nhưng cho OpenAI ecosystem (AGENTS.md ≈ CLAUDE.md)
Frameworks chạy bên dưới Claude-Flow, OpenClaw, A2A agents
